name: create_drc_ruledeck
short_description: Create one or more user defined DRC rule deck objects
full_help:
create_drc_ruledeck

Description: 
Create one or more user defined DRC rule deck objects

Syntax: 
create_drc_ruledeck  [-quiet] [-verbose] <ruledecks>...

Returns: 
drc_ruledeck

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  <ruledecks>  Names of DRC rule decks to create

Categories: 
DRC, Object

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
